summary: First-finish smoke test of SavyCampusDeals. Backend: 14/14 API checks pass (health, login admin, me, offers list+search+category, offer detail, claim as approved user, student-card, dashboard stats, forgot-password, signup, unverified 403 claim, verification auto-approve, save toggle, saved list, logout). Frontend: landing loads with hero CTA + nav-login, admin login redirects to /dashboard with dashboard-heading, /offers renders 12 cards, search 'Nike' filters to 1 card, /card shows student-card + QR. Console shows harmless 401 from /auth/me pre-login.
passed: GET /api/auth/me with Bearer returns admin, verification_status=approved
POST /api/offers/{id}/claim as approved user returns code SCD-XXXXXXXX + QR data URI
POST /api/verification/submit auto-approves and issues SCD-2026-XXXXXX student_number
Frontend login flow: admin login redirects to /dashboard, dashboard-heading visible
Frontend /offers renders 12 offer cards; search 'Nike' filters to 1
Frontend /card renders student-card + student-card-qr with QR image
notes: Auto-approval verification works as designed for MVP. Bearer-token fallback + cookie both function. Minor: /auth/me returns 401 for anonymous visitors (expected) but shows as console error on landing — cosmetic only.
